title: Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Odisha

overview.short: The Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Ganjam District, Odisha, India.
overview.description: The Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Ganjam District, Odisha, India. The wildlife sanctuary has an area 118 km2 (46 sq mi), in the Lakhari Valley of the Eastern Ghats range. The plant communities include coastal Sal (Shorea robusta) forests and mixed deciduous forests. Lakhari Valley is located in the Eastern Highlands moist deciduous forests ecoregion.

topPlaces.name: Padmasambhava Mahavihara monastery
topPlaces.description: The Padmasambhava Mahavihara Monastery, also known as Thupten Mindolling Monastery located at Jeerango, Gajapati district, in the state of Odisha, India, as the main monastery belonging to the Ripa Lineage. It is said to be the largest Buddhist monastery in Eastern India.

items.note: The Padmasambhava Mahavihara Monastery, also known as Thupten Mindolling Monastery located at Jeerango, Gajapati district, in the state of Odisha, India, as the main monastery belonging to the Ripa Lineage. It is said to be the largest Buddhist monastery in Eastern India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (188 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (167 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakhari Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Padmasambhava Mahavihara monastery.
